{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Black Dragon Trials
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Black Dragon Trials]] were designed for a team of five Lowgolds trained to work as a unit.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Black Dragon Trials]] are located in a narrow canyon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
